title: A faster, cleaner view of your Pollen activity
summary:
A dashboard-focused day: clearer Pollen activity, faster model discovery, a new reasoning model, and docs that survive copy-paste.

The Activity dashboard now runs on materialized Tinybird datasources, with unified infinite-scroll event history and daily charts for usage, earnings, BYOP markup, and community model rewards. Read-time event deduplication keeps the charts, transactions, and CSV exports accurate.

The dashboard’s Models section gained a search bar that filters by model name, display name, description, and provider while leaving navigation tabs in place. Muse Spark 1.1 also joined the catalog for text and image-to-text work, including its always-on reasoning mode.

The Python Quick Start now uses the correct OpenAI SDK `/v1` base URL, and generated media API docs send upload and retrieval curl examples to media.pollinations.ai rather than a text endpoint. Small slashes, large amounts of developer time.
